identity.name: RODDOS Contable IA
identity.description: An AI-powered accounting assistant for Colombian professionals, integrating seamlessly with Alegra ERP.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0F2A5C] text-white hover:bg-[#163A7A] hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 rounded-md font-semibold px-6 py-2.5
buttons.secondary: bg-[#C9A84C] text-[#0F2A5C] hover:bg-[#D4B65D] font-semibold rounded-md px-6 py-2.5
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#0F2A5C] text-[#0F2A5C] hover:bg-[#F0F4FF] font-semibold rounded-md px-6 py-2.5
buttons.ghost: text-[#64748B] hover:text-[#0F2A5C] hover:bg-[#F1F5F9] rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 hover:border-[#C9A84C]/50 hover:shadow-lg cursor-pointer transition-all duration-300
cards.metric: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border-l-4 border-[#0F2A5C] shadow-sm

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-[#C9A84C] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C9A84C] rounded-md h-11 text-base
inputs.search: bg-[#F1F5F9] border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-[#C9A84C] rounded-full px-5

tables.container: rounded-lg border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden bg-white shadow-sm
tables.header: bg-[#F8FAFC] text-[#64748B] font-semibold uppercase text-xs tracking-wider py-4

sidebar.container: bg-[#0F2A5C] text-white h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 border-r border-[#163A7A]
sidebar.link: text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-[#FFFFFF]/10 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 transition-colors flex items-center gap-3

alegra_selector.container: bg-[#F0F4FF] border border-[#00A9E0]/20 rounded-lg p-4 flex items-center gap-3
alegra_selector.badge: bg-[#00A9E0] text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full

do: Use high contrast for text (APCA standards).
Align numbers to the right in tables.
Use the 'Gold' accent sparingly for CTAs and focus states.
Keep the dashboard high-density but legible.
Ensure the 'Alegra Connected' status is always visible in the header.
dont: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds.
Do not use center alignment for long text.
Avoid 'SaaS Blue' generic colors; stick to the Navy/Gold brand.
Do not clutter the interface; use progressive disclosure (modals/drawers) for complex forms.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure all form inputs have labels. Use ARIA roles for custom components. Support keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE index.html/index.css to import Montserrat and Source Sans 3 from Google Fonts.
2. CONFIGURE tailwind.config.js to use the RODDOS color palette (primary: #0F2A5C, secondary: #C9A84C, etc.).
3. IMPLEMENT the 'Layout' component with the fixed sidebar and sticky header.
4. BUILD the 'AlegraAccountSelector' component specifically as requested.
5. USE Shadcn UI for all interactive elements but OVERRIDE default styles with the classes defined in 'components' section.
6. ENSURE the AI Chat widget is a floating component in the bottom-right corner.
7. START with the Login page using the 'login_bg' image.
8. CREATE the Dashboard with the 'Bento' grid layout.
